rationale: Change stream spec requires passing maxAwaitTimeMS to getMore/aggregate; driver silently ignored the option.

Regression bug: MongoClient.close hangs 30s after connection error; internal timing/implementation issue, no spec rule contradicted.

Fixing mongosh integration tests; CI/test infrastructure issue unrelated to spec behavior.
TypeScript type-checking performance regression (50x slower tsc); build tooling issue, no spec involvement.
Adding AWS Lambda code examples to driver repo; documentation/example task, not a spec conformance issue.
Read load balancing uneven with 2 eligible members; server selection distribution is an implementation detail not a specific spec rule.

Issue split from DRIVERS-1804; connection pool creation/ready state for direct connections per CMAP spec update.

Bulk update builder missing hint and pipeline update support for mongosh; API ergonomics addition, not spec nonconformance.

Fix nested import logic in legacy wrapper package; internal packaging/refactor issue.

TLS option mutual-exclusivity validation broken; corresponding spec tests not passing, explicitly noted in description.
Internal refactor to promisify selectServer and async change stream resume; no spec-defined behavior changed.
Expose libmongocrypt version in bindings for debugging; API ergonomics improvement, not spec related.
SDAM spec requires no parallel heartbeat checks; driver allowed concurrent monitoring connections, description cites SDAM spec.
TypeScript type definition missing 'hashed' from IndexDirection enum; TS API gap, not a spec conformance issue.
Driver doesn't fall back IPv4 if IPv6 fails; OS networking behavior, no spec rule governs IPv4/IPv6 fallback strategy.

TypeScript recursive collection schema type depth limitation; TS type system improvement, no spec involvement.
User BSON options (promoteValues, promoteLongs) lost after BSONv4 upgrade; internal options plumbing issue, not a BSON spec rule violation.
Change stream closes on replica set rebalance instead of resuming; resumability implementation bug, but spec resumption rules are complex to pin precisely.
Change stream spec requires indefinite resumption after successful aggregate; commit broke this by stopping after one resume attempt.
find().map().toArray() drops falsy values; cursor iteration implementation bug in JS logic, not a spec-defined cursor behavior.
ECONNREFUSED with autoEncryption connecting to local server; user configuration/environment issue, not a spec deviation.
Document raw option buffer pool sharing behavior; documentation improvement, no spec behavior change.
Deprecated TypeScript overloads ordered before non-deprecated ones causing type issues; TS API ordering fix, no spec involvement.
Feature request to enable command monitoring via connection string; API enhancement, not a spec nonconformance.
API docs link to wrong GitHub repo (personal fork instead of official); documentation infrastructure bug.

find() hangs after stepDown/primary-reelection cycle; SDAM topology update bug, hard to pin to specific spec rule vs implementation issue.

Fails to reconnect after primary failover in some cases; SDAM implementation bug but no specific spec rule clearly contradicted.
Add latest Node.js version to CI test matrix; CI/testing infrastructure improvement, no spec involvement.
Refactor BSON to use cross-platform JS APIs for browser/multi-runtime compatibility; internal implementation refactor.
